items.details: Would validate env/config resolution, runtime paths, lock readiness, Docker/Compose access, compose config, and current runtime health.

items.summary: A pre-update recovery point would be created
items.details: Scope prod would write a recovery point under REPLACE_BACKUP_ROOT using prefix espocrm-prod and would start the db container temporarily before taking the recovery point.
Would pull updated images, then restart the stack with the current configuration.
Would wait up to 600 seconds for db, espocrm, espocrm-daemon, and espocrm-websocket. The final HTTP probe would check http://127.0.0.1:18080.
